name: ytdlmusic

metadata.name: ytdlmusic
metadata.summary: ytdlmusic is a command-line program to search and download music files from YouTube without use browser.

documentation: The complete description/installation/use/FAQ is available at : https://github.com/thib1984/ytdlmusic#readme

documentation: string constants

functions.name: ytdlmusic.print.replace_all
documentation:
replace in param text with dict paramaters
example : dic = { "cat": "dog", "bird": "rabbit"}
text = "This is my cat and this is my bird."
-> "This is my dog and this is my rabbit."

documentation:
search the items with youtube-search-python
return a json with 5 entries of YouTube results
param : the artist and the song

modules.name: ytdlmusic.choice
documentation: choice user scripts

functions.name: ytdlmusic.choice.choice
documentation:
user choice after return of youtube-search-python
results : the selected choice
return 0 if automode and no result
if 0 is choosen by the user, exit 1
if illegal choice from user, print abort + exit 1
1 for default choice
auto : True if no interactive choice, False otherwise
